archivalDetails.description: Represents whether the site collection is recently archived, fully archived, or reactivating. The possible values are: recentlyArchived, fullyArchived, reactivating, unknownFutureValue.

dataLocationCode.description: The geographic region code for where this site collection resides. Only present for multi-geo tenants. Read-only.

hostname.description: The hostname for the site collection. Read-only.

root.description: If present, indicates that this is a root site collection in SharePoint. Read-only.
